title: Context Envelope v1
description: A versioned envelope for assembled context payloads passed between ecosystem tools. Producer: hyphae, rhizome, cortina, canopy. Consumer: model context assembly, cap operator view.

assembled_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the context envelope was assembled.

token_budget.description: Optional token budget tracking for the assembled context.

used.description: Tokens consumed by components in this envelope.

remaining.description: Tokens still available in the budget.

items.description: A component of the assembled context.

type.description: Component type. Known values: memory, symbols, session, diagnostics, handoff, task. Additional types may be added without breaking consumers.

source.description: Ecosystem tool that produced this component. Examples: hyphae, rhizome, cortina, canopy.

token_count.description: Estimated tokens consumed by this component's content.

components.description: Array of context components. Each component declares its type, source, token usage, and content.
